report.summary: Cycle-close v7: 331 PUBLISHED_PAGES stable, build on output:standalone, 6/6 API routes healthy with correct TTLs, CRITICAL staged next.config.ts still removes standalone output — must not be committed, rate limiter 0/6 public routes, 438 files staged uncommitted, FOMC T-2 (Mar 18) window active.

sections.title: QA Sweep
items: TypeScript errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (JSX syntax in .ts file — pre-existing, non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors:true)

100 pages in published-pages.ts missing page.tsx files — these slugs are listed as published but have no corresponding page component; affects /learn/*, /wallets/*, /taxes/*, /investing/best/*, /blog/* and others
Latest commit 1b4a15e (Fix ecosystem + courses routes, fix Stargate JSX error) touched 25 files — no regressions detected in reviewed components
Published page count: 331 — unchanged from v6

sections.title: Data Pipeline Health
items: All 6 public API routes present and structurally healthy: fear-greed (10m TTL), trending (5m TTL), market-metrics (1m TTL), market-dominance (5m TTL), prices (1m TTL), defi-yields (5m TTL)
Cache-Control headers set correctly with stale-while-revalidate on all routes
CARRY-OVER: Rate limiter (src/lib/rate-limiter.ts) exists but wired to /api/health only — 0/6 public data routes protected against abuse
defi-yields deviates from standard pattern: no in-memory FALLBACK constant, uses error-only fallback path — lower resilience than other routes

sections.title: DevOps / Deployment
items: Working next.config.ts has output:standalone confirmed — production deploy is healthy

CRITICAL (carry-over): Staged next.config.ts removes output:standalone AND removes webpack __dirname fix AND bumps staticGenerationMaxConcurrency from 4→8 — committing this as-is would break the Vercel build
788 total changed files / 438 staged — large uncommitted surface area persists from previous cycles
Latest deployed commit: 1b4a15e — fix to ecosystem + courses routes is live

sections.title: PM Wrap-up
items: Shipped this cycle: Sprint 59 (App Store v2, 176 dApps, ecosystem tabs), Day 15 publish batch (+3 learn guides), multiple build fixes (SSR, dynamic imports, edge runtime, Stargate JSX)
FOMC window opens Mar 18 (T-2 days) — high-signal publishing opportunity for macro/BTC content
Carry-over blockers: (1) staged next.config.ts must be fixed before next deploy, (2) rate limiter needs wiring to 6 public routes, (3) 100 queued pages need page.tsx files before they can go live
Recommended next cycle priority: fix staged next.config.ts → deploy clean build → wire rate limiter to prices + trending routes
